subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán and thou that hast turned thy face towards Mine own! Upon thee rest My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness, which have preceded all who dwell upon My earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی و المقبل الی وجهی علیک بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی التی سبقت من فی ارضی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
